sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85314" key="polushma/ntwr" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολυ-σημάντωρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ορος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n85314.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">giving commands to many, ruling over many,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Ἀϊδωνεύς</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0013.tlg002.perseus-grc1:84" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">h.Cer.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">84</biblScope></bibl></cit>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0013.tlg002.perseus-grc1:376" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">376</biblScope></bibl>, cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0013.tlg002.perseus-grc1:31" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">31</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
